from: Creative-writing repo has prose micro-branch postcards and examples but no machine-checkable intent record attached to an active branch.
to: Keep a small, validated micro-branch intent object for this branch up to date as the work evolves, instead of treating it as a one-shot setup.
route: For this session, revise this JSON to match the evolving goal and validate it against micro-branch-intent-object-v0.1.json; in later sessions, adjust from/to/route again near branch closure if needed.
